---
name: Service request
about: Request a legal, fixed-scope GitHub service
title: "[Service] "
labels: service-request
assignees: ""
---

## Requested Service

Choose one:

- [ ] Repository Cleanup
- [ ] GitHub Actions Fix
- [ ] Defensive Review Lite
- [ ] Security Documentation Pack
- [ ] Other:

## Repository / Link

Provide the GitHub repository, issue, pull request, or workflow run link.

## Authorization

Confirm that you own the repository or are authorized to request this work.

- [ ] I confirm authorization.

## Desired Deliverable

Describe the exact output you want: pull request, patch, review notes, templates, or validation notes.

## Deadline

When do you need this completed?

## Budget / Reward Range

State the expected budget or reward range before work starts.

## Public Or Private

- [ ] Public pull request is acceptable.
- [ ] Private notes preferred.
- [ ] Unsure; discuss first.

## Boundaries

- [ ] No unauthorized testing is requested.
- [ ] No credentials, secrets, or private data will be shared.
- [ ] Scope is limited to the link(s) above.
